summary: Iteration 176: Tested new features including Admin member update with merin_referral_code and trading_start_date, Referral tracking API returning onboarding_invite_link, Affiliate Center 'Invite Someone' card, and Sidebar Affiliate Center link. Backend: 11/12 passed (1 skipped - no merged posts in DB). Frontend: All features verified.
test_credentials: Master Admin: iam@ryansalvador.com / admin123, Test member ID: a9566813-3880-47c5-8703-7fa22fdb601d
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: 1) PUT /api/admin/members/{user_id} accepts merin_referral_code (stored uppercase) and trading_start_date fields. 2) GET /api/referrals/tracking returns onboarding_invite_link field with format https://crosscur.rent/onboarding?merin_code={CODE}. 3) Affiliate Center page (/affiliate) shows 'Invite Someone' card with data-testid='invite-someone-card', onboarding link input with data-testid='onboarding-invite-link-input', copy button with data-testid='copy-onboarding-invite-link'. 4) Sidebar has nav-affiliate (data-testid='nav-affiliate') and profile dropdown has sidebar-affiliate-center-link (data-testid='sidebar-affiliate-center-link'). 5) Referral Tracking page (/referral-tracking) shows new onboarding invite link with data-testid='invite-link-display'. 6) Forum merge_info tested - no merged posts in DB to verify but code path verified.

non_merged_post_no_merge_info.notes: Non-merged posts correctly have no merge_info

merged_post_has_merge_info.notes: No merged posts in DB to test

verified_features.admin_update_member_merin_referral_code: WORKING - PUT /api/admin/members/{user_id} with merin_referral_code field updates user's Merin code (stored uppercase)
verified_features.admin_update_member_trading_start_date: WORKING - PUT /api/admin/members/{user_id} with trading_start_date field (master_admin only)
verified_features.referral_tracking_invite_link: WORKING - GET /api/referrals/tracking returns invite_link (direct Merin) and onboarding_invite_link (crosscur.rent)
verified_features.affiliate_center_invite_someone_card: WORKING - Card shows onboarding link with copy button
verified_features.sidebar_affiliate_center_link: WORKING - Nav item and profile dropdown both contain Affiliate Center links
verified_features.forum_merged_post_info: PARTIAL - Code verified but no merged posts in DB to test live
